title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: The Mixture of Experts podcast discusses Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model and its tier routing system, Apple's announced shift to NVIDIA cloud compute partnership at WWDC 2026 departing from on-device AI, and whether AI models can detect sarcasm with multimodal inputs or context alone.
writeup: This episode of the Mixture of Experts podcast, hosted by Tim Hwang with guests, debates three topics. The first is Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 release and its tier routing system, which directs requests across model tiers. The second is Apple's WWDC 2026 announcement of a partnership with NVIDIA for cloud AI, a shift away from on-device models toward cloud infrastructure. The third is whether AI models can detect sarcasm.
